title: snow mod
description: This mod was created by user ___th___ specifically for the organization of S.O.V.E.T.
body:
This mod on this version of the game adds:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

snow that can fall in all biomes

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water that turns to ice over time in all biomes

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

snowmen don't die because of the climate in all biomes.

</details>
